svg.aria-label: Kill-chain detection telemetry — 6 stages, live SOC terminal
svg.title: Kill-chain detection telemetry — every stage caught, in 30 seconds
svg.desc: Animated SVG. Six-stage adversary kill-chain across the top. Each stage lights up red as a technique is observed, then turns blue when the matching detection rule fires. The bottom half is a live SOC terminal scrolling matched alerts in real time. Loops every 30 seconds.
